title: SDF Data — Base Schema
description: Base schema for data.json inside an SDF file. Document-type schemas extend this. Version: 0.1.

document_type.description: Class of document. Should match meta.json document_type. E.g. 'invoice', 'nomination', 'gov_tax_declaration'.

nomination_ref.description: Nomination reference identifier. Used for automated matching on the consumer side.

purchase_order_ref.description: Purchase order number in the recipient's system.

period.description: Reporting period in ISO 8601 date range format (e.g. '2026-01-01/2026-03-31').

$comment: Document-type-specific schemas (invoice, nomination, etc.) are defined separately under schemas/{document_type}/. They may $ref this base schema or define their own structure independently. The base schema does not use additionalProperties: false — document schemas define their own constraints.

amount.description: Decimal string. Never a bare number. E.g. '1250.00'.

id.description: Machine-readable identifier (VAT ID, GLN, government entity code, UUID).
